attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRANS)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.TRANSACTION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.CONSUMPTION_RELEASE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.CONSUMPTION_PO_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.CONSUMPTION_PROCESSED_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.NET_QTY, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.BATCH_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.RATE, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.RATE_TYPE, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.TAX_CODE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.TAX_RATE, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.ERROR_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.RECOVERABLE_TAX, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.NON_RECOVERABLE_TAX, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.TAX_RECOVERY_RATE, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.PARENT_TRANSACTION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.CHARGE_ACCOUNT_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.VARIANCE_ACCOUNT_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.GLOBAL_AGREEMENT_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.NEED_BY_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.ERROR_EXPLANATION, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.SECONDARY_NET_QTY, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.BLANKET_PRICE, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.INTERFACE_DISTRIBUTION_REF, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.ACCRUAL_ACCOUNT_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.OWNING_ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.TRANSACTION_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 DL_ACMSTG.STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX,
 (
 select REQUEST_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from DL_ACMSTG.STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX
 minus
 select REQUEST_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from DL_ACCUM.CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX
 ) ACM
 where 
 coalesce(ACM.REQUEST_ID,-999) = coalesce(STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.REQUEST_ID,-999) and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX.REFRESH_DATETIME
